sourcesContent:
import { Component, signal } from '@angular/core'; import { CommonModule } from '@angular/common'; import { FormsModule } from '@angular/forms'; export type TermVm = { id: string; term: string; definition: string; category: string; subject: string; }; @Component({ selector: 'app-contact', standalone: true, imports: [CommonModule, FormsModule], templateUrl: './contact.component.html' }) export class ContactComponent { isLoading = signal(false); submitted = signal(false); contactForm = signal({ name: '', email: '', subject: '', message: '' }); subjects = signal([ 'Question générale', 'Support technique', 'Inscription', 'Cours', 'Facturation', 'Autre' ]); submitForm() { this.isLoading.set(true); setTimeout(() => { this.isLoading.set(false); this.submitted.set(true); }, 1500); } resetForm() { this.contactForm.set({ name: '', email: '', subject: '', message: '' }); this.submitted.set(false); } }
